channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [AXISBANK] AXIS Bank to Infuse Rs. 1,500 Crore in Axis Finance Limited by March 2027
item.description:
🔥 Trending

AXIS Bank Ltd. has announced its intention to infuse Rs. 1,500 crore in its wholly owned subsidiary, Axis Finance Limited, by subscribing to the Rights Issue of AFL before March 31, 2027. The proposal was approved by the Acquisitions, Divestments and Merger Committee of the Board of Directors on March 18, 2026, and has received approval from the Reserve Bank of India. The investment is expected to support the growth of Axis Finance Limited.

  • AXIS Bank to invest Rs. 1,500 crore in Axis Finance Limited by March 2027
  • Investment approved by the Acquisitions, Divestments and Merger Committee of the Board of Directors
  • Approval received from the Reserve Bank of India
  • Investment aimed at supporting the growth of Axis Finance Limited
  • Axis Finance Limited is a Non-Banking Financial Company (NBFC)

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AXIS BANK LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [DCMSIL] DCM Shriram International Ltd Clarifies Significant Price Movement of Shares
item.description:
DCM Shriram International Ltd, in compliance with disclosure requirements, clarifies that there has been no development in the Company operations resulting in emergence of any price sensitive information. The Company believes that the recent development in the movement of the price in the Company shares is based on market perception and determined by market forces.

  • Company is in full compliance with disclosure requirements under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015
  • No development in the Company operations resulting in emergence of any price sensitive information
  • No impending announcement that will have a bearing on the volumes or price of the shares
  • Unaudited limited review report for the g.e. and p.e. Dec. 2025 was promptly put on public domain
  • Company remains committed to ensure full compliance with the Listing Regulations

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DCM Shriram International Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ARIES] Aries Agro Ltd Reports on Special Window Re-Lodgement of Shares for February 2026
item.description:
Aries Agro Ltd has released its monthly report on the re-lodgement of shares under the special window provided by the SEBI Circular dated 30th January 2026. The report, as of February 2026, confirms the status of requests received from shareholders for the re-lodgement of transfer requests for physical shares. The company's Registrar and Share Transfer Agent (RTA) has been processing these requests. The average time taken for processing these requests during the month was not specified in the text.

  • Aries Agro Ltd releases monthly report on special window re-lodgement of shares
  • Report as of February 2026 confirms status of share transfer requests
  • Company's RTA processing requests for re-lodgement of physical shares
  • Average time taken for processing requests not specified in the text
  • Compliance with SEBI Circular No.SEBI/HO/38/13/11(2)2026-MIRSD-POD/ 1/3750/2026 Dated 30th January, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ARIES AGRO LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [MANKIND] Mankind Pharma acquires Rivotril brand for India, reinforcing focus on chronic CNS therapies
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Mankind Pharma Limited has acquired the brand Rivotril from Roche for the Indian market, with exclusive rights to manufacture, market and distribute the product across the country. Rivotril is the innovator/reference brand of clonazepam and is widely prescribed for the management of neurological and psychiatric conditions. The acquisition builds on Mankind Pharma’s growing focus on chronic therapies, where the company has steadily expanded its presence through new launches, in-licensing partnerships and portfolio additions across key therapeutic areas. Mankind Pharma will leverage its nationwide distribution network and large field force to support wider access to Rivotril across healthcare institutions and prescribers in India.

  • Mankind Pharma acquires Rivotril brand for India
  • Exclusive rights to manufacture, market and distribute Rivotril in India
  • Strengthens Mankind Pharma’s strategic focus on chronic and CNS therapies
  • Adds a clonazepam Textbook brand with strong clinical legacy and specialist recall
  • Leveraging its large field force and nationwide distribution network to build the brand and support physicians in delivering better outcomes for patients across India

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mankind Pharma Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [UNISTRMU] Unistar Multimedia Ltd Discloses Unauthorized Filings on MCA Portal and Misrepresentation of Management Authority
item.description:
Unistar Multimedia Limited has informed the Stock Exchange and the investing public about unauthorized filings on the MCA portal. Certain e-Forms DIR-12 have been filed without the knowledge, authority, consent, or ratification of the Company or its Board, reflecting cessation of existing directors and appointment of new directors. The Company states that no Board Meeting was convened for approving any resignation, cessation, or appointment of directors. No notice of resignation was received from the concerned directors. No shareholders’ approval was sought or granted. The Company confirms that the following five directors continue to remain validly appointed and in office: Mr. Vivekkumar Maheshkumar Padhiyar, Mr. Abhishek Pratpkumar Thakkar, Ms. Rupinder Manjotsingh Oberoi, Mr. Kiritbhai Solanki, and Mr. Patel Vaibhavkumar Anilbhai. The Company and the aggrieved directors have lodged formal objections and representations with the Registrar of Companies (ROC) seeking rectification of records. They have also escalated the matter to the Regional Director (RD) and filed complaints with SEBI / SCORES. The Company expressly disowns and repudiates all acts purportedly carried out by any unauthorized persons and undertakes to fully indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the five continuing directors against any present or future loss, damage, cost, penalty, claim, demand, proceeding, legal expense arising directly or indirectly out of or in connection with such unauthorized filings, false disclosures, or misuse of digital signatures.

  • Unistar Multimedia Limited has informed about unauthorized filings on the MCA portal.
  • Certain e-Forms DIR-12 have been filed without the knowledge, authority, consent, or ratification of the Company or its Board.
  • The Company confirms that the following five directors continue to remain validly appointed and in office.
  • The Company and the aggrieved directors have lodged formal objections and representations with the Registrar of Companies (ROC) seeking rectification of records.
  • The Company undertakes to fully indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the five continuing directors against any present or future loss, damage, cost, penalty, claim, demand, proceeding, legal expense arising directly or indirectly out of or in connection with such unauthorized filings, false disclosures, or misuse of digital signatures.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UNISTAR MULTIMEDIA LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [CUBEINVIT] Cube Highways Trust to Convert from Private to Public Listed Infrastructure Investment Trust
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Cube Highways Trust has informed the Exchange about the disclosure of a material issue. The Board of Directors of Cube Highways Fund Advisors Private Limited, acting as the investment manager to the Trust, has approved the filing of a Draft Offer Document with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI). The Trust is proposing to convert from a private listed infrastructure investment trust to a public listed one through an offer for sale of units by existing eligible Unitholders. The draft offer document is available on the SEBI, stock exchange, and the InvIT's websites. Investors are advised to carefully read the draft offer document, including sections on 'Risk Factors' and 'Forward-Looking Statements', before making any investment decisions.

  • Cube Highways Trust to convert from private to public listed infrastructure investment trust
  • Board of Directors of Cube Highways Fund Advisors Private Limited approved the filing of Draft Offer Document with SEBI
  • Offer for sale of units by existing eligible Unitholders
  • Investors advised to read the draft offer document carefully
  • Available on SEBI, stock exchange, and InvIT's websites

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cube Highways Trust | Category: New Launch

item.title: [RELIANCE] Reliance Industries Faces Rs. 17,06,958 Customs Act Penalty for Incorrect Classification of Imported Goods
item.description:
Reliance Industries Ltd. has received an order dated March 16, 2026, from the Additional Commissioner of Customs, Mundra, imposing a redemption fine and penalty of Rs. 17,06,958 under the Customs Act, 1962. The order was received on March 17, 2026, via email at 09:49 a.m. (IST). The alleged incorrect classification of imported goods in the Bill of Entry has led to the levy of this fine and penalty. The Company plans to file an appeal against the order. The financial impact of the order is limited to the redemption fine and penalty, with no impact on operations or other activities of the Company.

  • Reliance Industries Ltd. received an order dated March 16, 2026, from the Additional Commissioner of Customs, Mundra
  • The order imposes a redemption fine and penalty of Rs. 17,06,958 under the Customs Act, 1962
  • The fine and penalty are due to the alleged incorrect classification of imported goods in the Bill of Entry
  • The Company intends to file an appeal against the order
  • The financial impact is limited to the redemption fine and penalty, with no impact on operations or other activities of the Company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RELIANCE INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [LTIM] LTM Named NVIDIA Partner Network ‘Rising Star Consulting Partner of the Year’ at NVIDIA GTC 2026
item.description:
LTM, the Business Creativity partner to the world’s largest enterprises, has been recognized as the NVIDIA Partner Network (NPN) ‘Rising Star Consulting Partner of the Year’ at NVIDIA GTC 2026. The award recognizes LTM’s strong collaboration with NVIDIA and its growing impact in helping enterprises move from Al experimentation to scalable, enterprise-ready adoption. The NVIDIA Partner Network (NPN) brings together a global ecosystem of technology and consulting partners working closely with NVIDIA to deliver advanced Al solutions. The Rising Star Consulting Partner of the Year award highlights LTM’s momentum in delivering Al solutions that are production-grade, secure, and designed for enterprise scale.

  • LTM named NVIDIA Partner Network ‘Rising Star Consulting Partner of the Year’ at NVIDIA GTC 2026
  • Recognition for strong collaboration with NVIDIA and growing impact in enterprise Al adoption
  • NVIDIA Partner Network (NPN) award for delivering production-grade, secure, and enterprise-scale Al solutions

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LTIMindtree Ltd | Category: Partnership

item.title: [THOMASCOOK] Thomas Cook (India) Ltd. to Consider and Approve Corporate Restructuring Proposal
item.description:
Thomas Cook (India) Limited has announced that a meeting of the Board of Directors will be held on Friday, March 20, 2026, to consider and approve a corporate restructuring proposal. The company aims to streamline its existing capital structure. In line with the company's policy on Prevention of Insider Trading, the 'Trading Window' for dealing in the securities of the company was closed for designated persons and/or their immediate relatives from March 18, 2026, and will remain closed up to March 22, 2026.

  • Thomas Cook (India) Limited to consider and approve a corporate restructuring proposal
  • Meeting of the Board of Directors to be held on Friday, March 20, 2026
  • Proposal aims to streamline the existing capital structure of the company
  • Trading Window closed for designated persons and/or their immediate relatives from March 18, 2026
  • Trading Window to remain closed up to March 22, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: THOMAS COOK (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [GODREJPROP] Godrej Properties Acquires 20-Acre Land Parcel Near Whitefield, Bengaluru with Estimated Revenue Potential of INR 1,350 Crore
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Godrej Properties Limited (GPL) has announced the acquisition of a ~20-acre land parcel in East Bengaluru, with plans to develop a premium residential project. The location is near NH-648 Main Road, within the Whitefield growth corridor, a well-established residential and commercial zone. The development has an estimated revenue potential of approximately INR 1,350 crore. The location is supported by operational metro stations and a robust social infrastructure, making it a self-sustained urban ecosystem. GPL is known for its commitment to innovation, sustainability, and excellence in the real estate sector.

  • Godrej Properties acquires a ~20-acre land parcel in East Bengaluru
  • The company plans to develop a premium residential project on this site
  • The location is near NH-648 Main Road, within the Whitefield growth corridor
  • The development has an estimated revenue potential of approximately INR 1,350 crore
  • The location is supported by operational metro stations and a robust social infrastructure

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Godrej Properties Ltd | Category: New Launch
